name: module_merge
template:
require "json"

# Greets callers from the template.
class Greeter
end

def greet(name)
end
destination:
require "set"

# Greets callers from the destination.
class Greeter
  def call(name)
    name.upcase
  end
end

def helper(name)
end

expected.output:
require "set"

    name.upcase
  end
end

end

end
